title: T-037 — fa_allergen_overrides table + audit chain (N-U4)
prompt:
# T-037 — fa_allergen_overrides schema

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §8.10
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create fa_allergen_overrides table per §8.10 with supersedes_id chain, partial index for current set, RLS, and audit_events mirror trigger.

## Implementation contract
Migration 0041 emits the table per spec (UUID PK, tenant_id, product_code FK CASCADE, allergen_code FK, action enum, reason CHECK length>=10, actor_user_id, actor_role, supersedes_id self-FK, superseded_at, created_at, schema_version), partial index WHERE superseded_at IS NULL, secondary index for history. Trigger writes audit_events(table='fa_allergen_overrides', op='INSERT'). RLS scoped per tenant.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0041_fa_allergen_overrides.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/fa-allergen-overrides.ts [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/fa-allergen-overrides.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0041 ran, when describing schema, then fa_allergen_overrides has both indexes and partial index condition WHERE superseded_at IS NULL
2. Given INSERT with reason length 5, when committing, then CHECK constraint rejects
3. Given INSERT a row, when committed, then audit_events row with table='fa_allergen_overrides' op='INSERT' and same actor_user_id is written by trigger

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 tests covering indexes, CHECK rejection, trigger
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test fa-allergen-overrides'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow reason shorter than 10
- Do not skip audit trigger
- Do not bypass tenant RLS
